full_text:
Sima Zhong (Zhengdu) 司馬衷 (正度)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Zhong (司馬衷), styledZhengdu (正度). The second Emperor of Jin. His reign saw the increase of military power by warlords. Sima Zhong was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty. Sima Zhong lived during the Three Kingdoms and Jin Dynasty period of Chinese history.
